name: Elmah.io
description: Elmah.io — Cloud error logging and uptime monitoring for .NET applications with log management and alerting via ELMAH.

seo.title: Elmah.io — Crash Reporting
seo.meta_description: Elmah.io: Elmah.io — Cloud error logging and uptime monitoring for .NET applications with log management and alerting via ELMAH.

when_to_use: Cloud error logging and uptime monitoring for .NET web applications
ELMAH-compatible structured log management with alerting for .NET teams
Integrating application exception tracking into Azure-hosted .NET apps
Monitoring ASP.NET Core app errors with Slack and Teams alert integrations

pros: .NET-native error logging with deep ELMAH roots
Uptime monitoring and alerting alongside logs
cons: Smaller ecosystem than Sentry or Datadog
UI less modern than newer competitors
review.verdict: Pragmatic choice for .NET shops that want ELMAH-style logging in the cloud without heavy vendor lock-in.
review.best_for: .NET/ASP.NET teams needing focused error logging and uptime
review.not_for: Polyglot shops or teams wanting full APM-grade tooling
